case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. HYOUNG JEONG SEO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SEO, HYOUNG JEONG PARK, JIN HYE DOES 1 TO 5,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SEO, HYOUNG JEONG PARK, JIN HYE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SEO, HYOUNG JEONG PARK, JIN HYE
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE:$53.17 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEO, HYOUNG JEONG PARK, JIN HYE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1345 FILLMORE ST. #402, S.F. CA. 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEO, HYOUNG JEONG PARK, JIN HYE
